features: As flexible and reliable, you hardly feel anything
Thanks to the odor-neutralizing technology you feel all day fresh and confident
Panty liners that are designed to be comfortable, so you hardly feel
Absorbent core that provides trusted protection all day long. Breathable design that gives the familiar dryness

description: Product Description Always Dailies Fresh & Protect Normal Fresh Panty Liners x58. Feel fresh all day long with Always Fresh Dailies & Protect Normal fresh Pantyliners. Their design combines comfort everyday comfort and protection, which can count on you. Moreover, they are so flexible that you hardly feel that you have them on. Ideal for vaginal discharge or as extra protection for irregular menstruation. Ingredients Cotton Directions 1) Unwrap the individual panty liner, 2) Position it correctly in underwear, 3) Dispose of properly when soiled. Safety Warning To avoid danger of suffocation, keep all packaging away from babies and children. See more
